_description: Reproducible behaviour worth a future debugger's time: symptoms seen, root cause found, fix applied. Includes recurring footguns (the footgun IS the symptom). Append only; prefer a new entry over editing when understanding evolves.

title: Worker tasks time out at 300s, no logs
symptoms: Run stuck in `running` until retry budget exhausts
root_cause: Default `task_time_limit` is 300s. Ingest jobs that pull large S3 objects over slow links exceed it; SIGTERM is delivered between log flushes, so the worker dies before flushing.
fix: Set `task_time_limit=1800` and `task_soft_time_limit=1500` in `worker/celery_app.py`. Soft limit raises SoftTimeLimitExceeded which the task can catch and flush before the hard kill.

title: api returns 422 on valid payload after worker deploy
symptoms: worker accepts the same payload via internal callback
root_cause: `packages/contracts/source.py` added a required field. The worker image was rebuilt and rolled out before the api image, so api was running the old contract that did not yet emit `source_type`.
fix: Roll `packages/contracts/` changes as: (1) make field optional with default, ship both services, (2) backfill, (3) make field required, ship both services again. Document in `decisions.jsonl` if the contract changes are frequent enough to warrant a versioning scheme.
